blended.narrative: Crystal Mountain Michigan is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 53°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
